SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.connectors

Class PrivilegedConnector

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_u.components.connectors.AbstractConnector
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.connectors.PublishingConnector
fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.connectors.PrivilegedConnector
All Implemented Interfaces:
fr.sorbonne_u.components.connectors.ConnectorI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.ComponentInterface, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.OfferedCI, fr.sorbonne_u.components.interfaces.RequiredCI, PrivilegedClientCI, PublishingCI, Remote
public class PrivilegedConnector extends PublishingConnector implements PrivilegedClientCI
Connecteur reliant un port outbound client PrivilegedClientCI au port inbound PrivilegedClientCI du broker.

Sens du raccordement : la référence AbstractConnector.offering pointe vers le port inbound du broker qui offre PrivilegedClientCI. Les opérations de publication sont héritées de PublishingConnector (Phase D.2) : PrivilegedClientCI étend PublishingCI, donc le connecteur privilégié est-un connecteur de publication.

Phase D.5 : les exceptions métier déclarées sur la CI sont propagées telles quelles ; toute autre Exception technique est encapsulée dans une RemoteException.

Author:
Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa

  • Method Details

    • hasCreatedChannel

      public boolean hasCreatedChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PrivilegedClientCI
      return true if the component has created channel.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      hasCreatedChannel in interface PrivilegedClientCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - channel to be tested.
      Returns:
      true if the component has created channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PrivilegedClientCI.hasCreatedChannel(String, String)

    • channelQuotaReached

      public boolean channelQuotaReached(String receptionPortURI) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PrivilegedClientCI
      return true if the component registered under receptionPortURI has reached its channel quota.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      channelQuotaReached in interface PrivilegedClientCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      Returns:
      true if the component registered under receptionPortURI has reached its channel quota.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PrivilegedClientCI.channelQuotaReached(String)

    • createChannel

      public void createChannel(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PrivilegedClientCI
      create a new channel of the given name with a set of users authorised to use it.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    autorisedUsers == null || !autorisedUsers.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      createChannel in interface PrivilegedClientCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - identifier of the requesting component i.e., URI of its inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel to be created.
      autorisedUsers - regular expression that matches the URIs of components that must be authorised to use the new channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PrivilegedClientCI.createChannel(String, String, String)

    • modifyAuthorisedUsers

      public void modifyAuthorisedUsers(String receptionPortURI, String channel, String autorisedUsers) throws Exception
      Description copied from interface: PrivilegedClientCI
      replace the users authorised to use channel.

      Contract

       pre    receptionPortURI != null && !receptionPortURI.isEmpty()
 pre    channel != null && !channel.isEmpty()
 pre    autorisedUsers != null && !autorisedUsers.isEmpty()
 post   true        // no postcondition.
      Specified by:
      modifyAuthorisedUsers in interface PrivilegedClientCI
      Parameters:
      receptionPortURI - identifier of the requesting component i.e., URI of its inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI.
      channel - name of the channel.
      autorisedUsers - regular expression that matches the URIs of components that must be authorised to use the new channel.
      Throws:
      Exception - to do.
      See Also:
      • PrivilegedClientCI.modifyAuthorisedUsers(String, String, String)
